bannerTwo.description: All websites-large & small-run the risk of crashes and data loss. CodeGuard's cloud backup lets you recover your website data instantly, with just a few clicks.

pricing.title: Select a plan for your website

items.title: Automatic backups
items.description: CodeGuard works behind the scenes. Which means you can turn it on and sit back while CodeGuard takes regular backups of your data.

items.title: Hassle-free setup

featuresTwo.title: How it Works
featuresTwo.description: Connect your website to CodeGuard using your SFTP/MySQL information. Once connected, an initial backup will start automatically.

items.title: Connect your website
items.description: Connect your website to CodeGuard using your SFTP/MySQL information. Once connected, an initial backup will start automatically.

items.title: Get regular backup updates
items.description: CodeGuard automatially monitors your website's files & databases for changes, performs backups and notifies you by email.

items.title: Restore from any point
items.description: Restore your website's files & database to any previous backup version by downloading a zip file, performing an automatic restore or restoring individual files.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our hosting plans, services, and features.

items.question: What is CodeGuard ?
items.answer: CodeGuard is a fully automated website backup service that gives you complete protection against data loss and malware.

items.question: Why do I need CodeGuard ?
items.answer: CodeGuard provides an independent offsite backup solution for your website along with daily monitoring to ensure your website is online and malware free.

items.question: How does it work ?
items.answer: CodeGuard takes daily automated snapshots of your website. Using these snapshots, you can restore your entire site or a specific file to an earlier version at any time.

items.question: What if I run out of storage ?
items.answer: Switching plans is easy! You can upgrade and increase your disk storage allowance in just a few simple clicks via our client area.

items.question: Where are backups stored ?
items.answer: Backups are stored on Amazon Web Services Simple Storage System which provides market leading resiliance and redundancy for your backups.

items.question: Are the backups encrypted ?
items.answer: Yes, backups are stored encrypted using the AES-256 Encryption Standard.

items.question: Do you backup databases ?
items.answer: Yes, databases can be backed up also. Database backups are supported for MySQL and MSSQL databases.

items.question: What is File Change Alert Monitoring ?
items.answer: CodeGuard can monitor and notify you by email when your website changes to alert you to new threats and malware.

items.question: What happens if my site gets infected ?
items.answer: With CodeGuard's daily snapshots, if your website gets attacked, you can restore to a previous uninfected version at any time.
